label: v16.2
notes: Release-hardening edition from v16.1 quality-polish release
Improved service-worker update flow with waiting-worker activation before reload
Added stop-word tolerant search for names such as Notre-Dame-de-la-Salette
Added accessibility labels for search/filter controls and update actions
Cleaned release package to avoid stale v16.0/v16.1 reports
Preserved full validated 383-row database and GitHub Pages structure
